title: FluXify
description:
Optimize and Enhance YOUR Minecraft World!
Boosts your Minecraft with smoother performance and better visuals. improved lighting, vibrant textures, and much more!
body:
Optimize and Enhance YOUR Minecraft World!
Boosts your Minecraft with smoother performance and better visuals. improved lighting, vibrant textures, and much more! CLIENT SIDE!

This modpack also uses "Stay True" resoursepack!
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

My pack had many things, and a lot of optimization! and I hope my pack will help you save your minecraft from FPS drop! If u have any ideas or questions, just tell me about it! my discord @ fitail

I hope you enjoy my pack
